original_statement: "South Korea: 1754 rating (20th), 77% chance of advancing Czechia: 1691 rating (31st), 60% chance of advancing South Africa: 1526 rating (45th), 35% chance of advancing"
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group A qualification probability
statement_context: Excerpt from DTAI Analytics Lab model via ESPN published on 2026-06-05. Uses 20,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: South Africa fails to qualify for the knockout stage from Group A in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-24.
source_text_snippet: South Africa: 1526 rating (45th), 35% chance of advancing
